title: Apply targeted non-breaking dashboard dependency fixes

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Starting phase 2: run npm audit fix (non-force) once and compare full/prod audit deltas; retain only non-breaking beneficial changes.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Phase 2 result: ran npm audit fix (non-force) once; no vulnerability reduction (still full 52, prod-only 4 moderate). Command only produced non-beneficial lockfile churn, which was reverted. No breaking/downgrade changes retained.
